Resources

MREA Launches Four Strategic Councils to Serve Global Muslim Real Estate Community

MREA Expands to 50 Chapters Across North America, MENA, and Europe

Industry Research

Market Research

Muslim Homeownership Report 2026

Analysis of homeownership rates, barriers, and trends among Muslim households in the United States.

Finance

Halal Real Estate Financing: A Practitioner's Guide

Overview of Shariah-compliant mortgage structures, accessibility, and lender landscape in 2026.

Policy

Community Wealth Gap: Muslim Americans & Real Estate Equity

Data-driven report on wealth disparities and policy recommendations for community advocacy.

Educational Materials

Real Estate Licensing Prep Resources

Links and guides for members pursuing their first real estate license.

CE Credits & Continuing Education

Accredited continuing education courses available to MREA members.

Investment Fundamentals Series

Member-only video series covering buy-and-hold, commercial, and syndication basics.

Fair Housing & Ethics Training

Annual certification recommended for all active MREA members.

Full Resource Library Available to Members

Join MREA to access our complete library of research reports, video courses, and professional development tools.

Become a Member
MREA
Global Network

A 501(c)(6) trade association dedicated to empowering Muslim real estate professionals worldwide through ethical leadership, advocacy, and community.

© 2026 Muslim Real Estate Association, a Texas Nonprofit Corporation.

501(c)(6) trade organization. Not a securities dealer or investment advisor. Fiscal year ends December 31.
